velocity: In the final month of 2025 Anthropic posted several AI‑focused positions, including a Senior Machine‑Learning Engineer (remote, working on large‑scale language‑model training and inference optimization), an Applied Research Scientist – Safety (San Francisco, focusing on alignment, interpretability and robust deployment of Claude‑style models), a Machine‑Learning Infrastructure Engineer (Seattle, building distributed training pipelines and GPU‑cluster tooling), a Data‑Engineering Lead for AI‑Product Analytics (remote, responsible for large‑scale data pipelines that feed model‑usage metrics), and a Junior Research Engineer (Boston, supporting experiments on prompt‑engineering and low‑resource fine‑tuning). All of these listings appeared on Anthropic’s careers portal and were publicly visible between December 1 and December 31 2025.
